144 public static TypeCode GetTypeCode(object value)
145 {
146 if (value == null)
147 {
148 return TypeCode.Empty;
149 }
150 IConvertible convertible = value as IConvertible;
151 if (convertible != null)
152 {
153 return convertible.GetTypeCode();
154 }
155 return TypeCode.Object;
156 }

159 public static bool IsDBNull(object value)
160 {

162 {
163 return true;
164 }

166 return convertible != null && convertible.GetTypeCode() == TypeCode.DBNull;

175 // Token: 0x0600066E RID: 1646 RVA: 0x0001AF50 File Offset: 0x00019150
176 public static object ChangeType(object value, TypeCode typeCode, IFormatProvider provider)
177 {
178 if (value == null && (typeCode == TypeCode.Empty || typeCode == TypeCode.String || typeCode == TypeCode.Object))
179 {
180 return null;
181 }
182 IConvertible convertible = value as IConvertible;
183 if (convertible == null)
184 {
185 throw new InvalidCastException("Object must implement IConvertible.");
186 }
187 switch (typeCode)
188 {
189 case TypeCode.Empty:
190 throw new InvalidCastException("Object cannot be cast to Empty.");
191 case TypeCode.Object:
192 return value;
193 case TypeCode.DBNull:
194 throw new InvalidCastException("Object cannot be cast to DBNull.");
195 case TypeCode.Boolean:
196 return convertible.ToBoolean(provider);
197 case TypeCode.Char:
198 return convertible.ToChar(provider);
199 case TypeCode.SByte:
200 return convertible.ToSByte(provider);
201 case TypeCode.Byte:
202 return convertible.ToByte(provider);
203 case TypeCode.Int16:
204 return convertible.ToInt16(provider);
205 case TypeCode.UInt16:
206 return convertible.ToUInt16(provider);
207 case TypeCode.Int32:
208 return convertible.ToInt32(provider);
209 case TypeCode.UInt32:
210 return convertible.ToUInt32(provider);
211 case TypeCode.Int64:
212 return convertible.ToInt64(provider);
213 case TypeCode.UInt64:
214 return convertible.ToUInt64(provider);
215 case TypeCode.Single:
216 return convertible.ToSingle(provider);
217 case TypeCode.Double:
218 return convertible.ToDouble(provider);
219 case TypeCode.Decimal:
220 return convertible.ToDecimal(provider);
221 case TypeCode.DateTime:
222 return convertible.ToDateTime(provider);
223 case TypeCode.String:
224 return convertible.ToString(provider);
225 }
226 throw new ArgumentException("Unknown TypeCode value.");
227 }

230 internal static object DefaultToType(IConvertible value, Type targetType, IFormatProvider provider)
231 {
232 if (targetType == null)
233 {
234 throw new ArgumentNullException("targetType");
235 }
236 if (value.GetType() == targetType)
237 {
238 return value;
239 }
240 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[3])
241 {
242 return value.ToBoolean(provider);
243 }
244 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[4])
245 {
246 return value.ToChar(provider);
247 }
248 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[5])
249 {
250 return value.ToSByte(provider);
251 }
252 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[6])
253 {
254 return value.ToByte(provider);
255 }
256 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[7])
257 {
258 return value.ToInt16(provider);
259 }
260 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[8])
261 {
262 return value.ToUInt16(provider);
263 }
264 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[9])
265 {
266 return value.ToInt32(provider);
267 }
268 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[10])
269 {
270 return value.ToUInt32(provider);
271 }
272 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[11])
273 {
274 return value.ToInt64(provider);
275 }
276 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[12])
277 {
278 return value.ToUInt64(provider);
279 }
280 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[13])
281 {
282 return value.ToSingle(provider);
283 }
284 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[14])
285 {
286 return value.ToDouble(provider);
287 }
288 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[15])
289 {
290 return value.ToDecimal(provider);
291 }
292 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[16])
293 {
294 return value.ToDateTime(provider);
295 }
296 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[18])
297 {
298 return value.ToString(provider);
299 }
300 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[1])
301 {
302 return value;
303 }
304 if (targetType == Convert.EnumType)
305 {
306 return (Enum)value;
307 }
308 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[2])
309 {
310 throw new InvalidCastException("Object cannot be cast to DBNull.");
311 }
312 if (targetType == Convert.ConvertTypes[0])
313 {
314 throw new InvalidCastException("Object cannot be cast to Empty.");
315 }
316 throw new InvalidCastException(string.Format("Invalid cast from '{0}' to '{1}'.", value.GetType().FullName, targetType.FullName));

325 // Token: 0x06000671 RID: 1649 RVA: 0x0001B2B8 File Offset: 0x000194B8
326 public static object ChangeType(object value, Type conversionType, IFormatProvider provider)
327 {
328 if (conversionType == null)
329 {
330 throw new ArgumentNullException("conversionType");
331 }
332 if (value == null)
333 {
334 if (conversionType.IsValueType)
335 {
336 throw new InvalidCastException("Null object cannot be converted to a value type.");
337 }
338 return null;
339 }
340 else
341 {
342 IConvertible convertible = value as IConvertible;
343 if (convertible == null)
344 {
345 if (value.GetType() == conversionType)
346 {
347 return value;
348 }
349 throw new InvalidCastException("Object must implement IConvertible.");
350 }
351 else
352 {
353 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[3])
354 {
355 return convertible.ToBoolean(provider);
356 }
357 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[4])
358 {
359 return convertible.ToChar(provider);
360 }
361 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[5])
362 {
363 return convertible.ToSByte(provider);
364 }
365 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[6])
366 {
367 return convertible.ToByte(provider);
368 }
369 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[7])
370 {
371 return convertible.ToInt16(provider);
372 }
373 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[8])
374 {
375 return convertible.ToUInt16(provider);
376 }
377 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[9])
378 {
379 return convertible.ToInt32(provider);
380 }
381 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[10])
382 {
383 return convertible.ToUInt32(provider);
384 }
385 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[11])
386 {
387 return convertible.ToInt64(provider);
388 }
389 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[12])
390 {
391 return convertible.ToUInt64(provider);
392 }
393 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[13])
394 {
395 return convertible.ToSingle(provider);
396 }
397 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[14])
398 {
399 return convertible.ToDouble(provider);
400 }
401 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[15])
402 {
403 return convertible.ToDecimal(provider);
404 }
405 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[16])
406 {
407 return convertible.ToDateTime(provider);
408 }
409 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[18])
410 {
411 return convertible.ToString(provider);
412 }
413 if (conversionType == Convert.ConvertTypes[1])
414 {
415 return value;
416 }
417 return convertible.ToType(conversionType, provider);
418 }
419 }
420 }

1523 {
1524 if (value < 2147483647.5)
1525 {
1526 int num = (int)value;
1527 double num2 = value - (double)num;
1528 if (num2 > 0.5 || (num2 == 0.5 && (num & 1) != 0))
1529 {
1530 num++;

1532 return num;
1533 }
1534 }
1535 else if (value >= -2147483648.5)
1536 {
1537 int num3 = (int)value;

1539 if (num4 < -0.5 || (num4 == -0.5 && (num3 & 1) != 0))
1540 {
1541 num3--;
1542 }
1543 return num3;
1544 }
1545 throw new OverflowException("Value was either too large or too small for an Int32.");

2568 // Token: 0x06000778 RID: 1912 RVA: 0x0001C070 File Offset: 0x0001A270
2569 public static string ToString(object value, IFormatProvider provider)
2570 {
2571 IConvertible convertible = value as IConvertible;
2572 if (convertible != null)
2573 {
2574 return convertible.ToString(provider);
2575 }
2576 IFormattable formattable = value as IFormattable;
2577 if (formattable != null)
2578 {
2579 return formattable.ToString(null, provider);
2580 }
2581 if (value != null)
2582 {
2583 return value.ToString();
2584 }
2585 return string.Empty;
2586 }
2587

2776 // Token: 0x06000797 RID: 1943 RVA: 0x0001C1E8 File Offset: 0x0001A3E8
2777 public static byte ToByte(string value, int fromBase)
2778 {
2779 if (fromBase != 2 && fromBase != 8 && fromBase != 10 && fromBase != 16)
2780 {
2781 throw new ArgumentException("Invalid Base.");
2782 }
2783 if (value == null)
2784 {
2785 return 0;
2786 }
2787 int num = ParseNumbers.StringToInt(value.AsSpan(), fromBase, 4608);
2788 if (num < 0 || num > 255)
2789 {
2790 Convert.ThrowByteOverflowException();
2791 }
2792 return (byte)num;
2793 }
2794
2795 // Token: 0x06000798 RID: 1944 RVA: 0x0001C23C File Offset: 0x0001A43C
2796 [CLSCompliant(false)]
2797 public static sbyte ToSByte(string value, int fromBase)
2798 {
2799 if (fromBase != 2 && fromBase != 8 && fromBase != 10 && fromBase != 16)
2800 {
2801 throw new ArgumentException("Invalid Base.");
2802 }
2803 if (value == null)
2804 {
2805 return 0;
2806 }
2807 int num = ParseNumbers.StringToInt(value.AsSpan(), fromBase, 5120);
2808 if (fromBase != 10 && num <= 255)
2809 {
2810 return (sbyte)num;
2811 }
2812 if (num < -128 || num > 127)
2813 {
2814 Convert.ThrowSByteOverflowException();
2815 }
2816 return (sbyte)num;
2817 }
2818
2819 // Token: 0x06000799 RID: 1945 RVA: 0x0001C2A0 File Offset: 0x0001A4A0
2820 public static short ToInt16(string value, int fromBase)
2821 {
2822 if (fromBase != 2 && fromBase != 8 && fromBase != 10 && fromBase != 16)
2823 {
2824 throw new ArgumentException("Invalid Base.");
2825 }
2826 if (value == null)
2827 {
2828 return 0;
2829 }
2830 int num = ParseNumbers.StringToInt(value.AsSpan(), fromBase, 6144);
2831 if (fromBase != 10 && num <= 65535)
2832 {
2833 return (short)num;
2834 }
2835 if (num < -32768 || num > 32767)
2836 {
2837 Convert.ThrowInt16OverflowException();
2838 }
2839 return (short)num;
2840 }
2841
2842 // Token: 0x0600079A RID: 1946 RVA: 0x0001C308 File Offset: 0x0001A508
2843 [CLSCompliant(false)]
2844 public static ushort ToUInt16(string value, int fromBase)
2845 {
2846 if (fromBase != 2 && fromBase != 8 && fromBase != 10 && fromBase != 16)
2847 {
2848 throw new ArgumentException("Invalid Base.");
2849 }
2850 if (value == null)
2851 {
2852 return 0;
2853 }
2854 int num = ParseNumbers.StringToInt(value.AsSpan(), fromBase, 4608);
2855 if (num < 0 || num > 65535)
2856 {
2857 Convert.ThrowUInt16OverflowException();
2858 }
2859 return (ushort)num;
